summary: Frontend testing for UI consistency update (grijs/gray instead of zwart/black) and SEO implementation. Most changes were applied correctly. Found 4 remaining locations where 'black' is still used in gradient hero sections and 1 active-tab bg-black in DemoPreview component.

ui_bugs.issue: Active demo tab still uses bg-black instead of bg-gray-900. When Pro tab is selected on homepage, it shows pure black background.
Hero section gradient uses 'via-black': bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-900 via-black to-gray-800. Should be via-gray-900 for consistency.
Hero gradient uses 'from-black via-gray-900 to-black'. Both from-black and to-black should be from-gray-900 to-gray-900.
Hero section gradient uses 'via-black': bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-900 via-black to-gray-800. Should be via-gray-900.

issues: TestimonialsSection component is defined with bg-gray-900 (correctly changed) but is NOT rendered in the LandingPage component. The component exists but is unused - no testimonials section visible on homepage.

passed_tests: 1. Homepage loads correctly with abstract background ✓
2. SEO title on homepage: 'Yrvante | Professionele Websites voor ZZP\'ers & MKB | Nederland' ✓
3. Package cards on homepage have hover:bg-gray-800 (NOT hover:bg-black) ✓
4. Testimonials section code has bg-gray-900 (correctly changed from bg-black) ✓
5. Calculator page loads with SEO title 'Website Prijscalculator | Bereken Je Website Kosten | Yrvante' ✓
6. Calculator selected package uses bg-gray-800 (NOT bg-black) ✓
7. Calculator add-on checkboxes use bg-gray-800 (NOT bg-black) ✓
8. Pakketten page loads with SEO title 'Website Pakketten & Prijzen | Yrvante' ✓
9. Pakketten popular card uses bg-gray-900 (NOT bg-black) ✓
10. Over Mij page loads with SEO title 'Over Mij | Yrvante Webdesign' ✓ - no bg-black elements
11. Over Mij has bg-gray-900 CTA section ✓
12. Onderhoud page loads with SEO title 'Website Onderhoud & Hosting | €25/maand | Yrvante' ✓
13. Onderhoud has 2 bg-gray-900 sections ✓
14. Diensten page loads with SEO title 'Webdesign Diensten | Yrvante' ✓
15. Diensten has bg-gray-900 CTA section ✓
16. WhyWebsite page loads with SEO title 'Waarom Heb Je Een Website Nodig? | Yrvante' ✓
17. WhyWebsite has bg-gray-900 features section ✓
18. Blog page loads with SEO title 'Blog: Waarom Een Website Geen Luxe Meer Is | Yrvante' ✓
19. Blog has bg-gray-900 section ✓
20. SEO title changes when navigating between pages (Homepage → Pakketten → Calculator all unique) ✓
action_items: Fix DemoPreview.jsx line 693: Change 'bg-black text-white shadow-xl scale-105' to 'bg-gray-900 text-white shadow-xl scale-105' for active demo tab
Fix PackagesPage.jsx line 157: Change 'bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-900 via-black to-gray-800' to 'bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-900 via-gray-900 to-gray-800' (or simplify to 'bg-gray-900')
Fix WhyWebsitePage.jsx line 202: Change 'bg-gradient-to-b from-black via-gray-900 to-black' to 'bg-gradient-to-b from-gray-900 via-gray-800 to-gray-900'
Fix BlogPage.jsx line 265: Change 'bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-900 via-black to-gray-800' to 'bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-900 via-gray-900 to-gray-800'
(Optional) Consider whether to add TestimonialsSection back to LandingPage render - it is defined but not rendered
critical_code_review_comments: DemoPreview.jsx: Active tab still uses bg-black (line 693). Most visible issue - the Pro demo tab is rendered black on the homepage.
PackagesPage/BlogPage hero gradients: Both use 'via-black' in gradient which creates black center in the gradient. Should be via-gray-900 or via-gray-800 for consistency.
WhyWebsitePage hero: Uses 'from-black to-black' gradient - most extreme case since both start AND end are black.
TestimonialsSection (LandingPage.jsx): Component has correct bg-gray-900 class but is NOT included in LandingPage render - dead code.
CalculatorPage modal overlay (line 668): bg-black/60 - this is a semi-transparent overlay, acceptable.
AdminDashboard bg-black: Admin-only UI, separate from public-facing pages - acceptable.

success_rate.frontend: 80% - Core gray changes implemented correctly. 4 hero gradient sections and 1 DemoPreview tab still use black.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 testing: All major gray-vs-black changes were verified. Package cards hover, popular card, add-on checkboxes, CTA sections all correctly use bg-gray-900 or bg-gray-800. SEO implementation verified working. Remaining issues: 1) DemoPreview.jsx line 693 active tab still bg-black, 2) PackagesPage/BlogPage hero gradients have via-black, 3) WhyWebsitePage hero has from-black to-black gradient, 4) TestimonialsSection defined but not rendered in LandingPage.
